title: Remote Work Policy
description: Employees can work remotely up to two days per week with manager approval.

title: Annual Leave Policy
description: Full-time employees receive 20 days of annual leave per year.

title: Sick Leave Policy
description: Employees receive 10 sick leave days annually.

title: Parental Leave Policy
description: Eligible employees receive paid parental leave.

title: Travel Expense Policy
description: Business travel expenses are reimbursable with receipts.

title: Code of Conduct
description: All employees must follow ethical business practices.

title: IT Security Policy
description: Use strong passwords and MFA on company systems.

title: Overtime Policy
description: Overtime must be pre-approved by management.

title: Training Policy
description: Employees are encouraged to complete annual training.
